name: Sales
tagline: Research accounts, draft outreach, and update the CRM with agents wired into your stack.
heroTitle: An SDR that works the whole pipeline.
heroSubtitle: Research prospects, write personalized outreach, prep call notes, and keep the CRM current, with agents connected to your email, calendar, and Salesforce or HubSpot. Less admin, more selling.
intro: Reps lose hours to research, follow-ups, and data entry. Ryu agents connect to the apps your deals live in through Connections, so they can read an account, draft the next touch, and update the record, taking real actions instead of just suggesting them.

highlights.title: Acts in your stack
highlights.description: Connect Gmail, Outlook, Salesforce, HubSpot, and Slack so agents can read, draft, and update where you already work.

highlights.title: Personalized at scale
highlights.description: Research each account and write outreach that sounds like you, grounded in real signals, not generic templates.

highlights.title: CRM stays current
highlights.description: Agents log calls, update stages, and fill fields after every interaction, so the pipeline reflects reality.

highlights.title: Your data, governed
highlights.description: Every call passes the Gateway: budgets keep cost predictable and the audit trail shows what was sent.

useCases.title: Account research
useCases.description: Pull a one-page brief on a prospect: news, funding, tech stack, and a hook, before you ever pick up the phone.

useCases.title: Personalized outreach
useCases.description: Draft first-touch emails and follow-up sequences tailored to each account, in your voice and ready to send.

useCases.title: Call prep & recaps
useCases.description: Generate a pre-call brief, then turn the recording or notes into a recap, next steps, and a CRM update.

useCases.title: CRM hygiene
useCases.description: Update deal stages, log activities, and fill missing fields automatically after every meeting and email.

useCases.title: Inbox triage
useCases.description: Sort and prioritize inbound replies, draft responses, and surface the deals that need you today.

useCases.title: Proposals & quotes
useCases.description: Assemble tailored proposals and pricing from your templates and the account's context in minutes.

examplePrompts: Research this account and give me a one-page brief with a personalized opener for the VP of Eng.
Draft a 4-email follow-up sequence for the deal that went quiet after the demo.
Summarize this call recording into next steps and update the opportunity in HubSpot.
Triage my inbox and list the five replies most likely to be ready to buy.
Build a proposal for this prospect from our standard deck and their stated requirements.

faq.q: Which CRMs and tools does it connect to?
faq.a: Through Connections (powered by Composio) agents reach Salesforce, HubSpot, Gmail, Outlook, Slack, calendars, and hundreds more. Authenticate once and the agent can act, with tokens held in the Gateway's vault.
No. Agents research each account and write in your voice from real signals. You review and send, so you stay in control of every message that goes out.

faq.q: Can I control what an agent is allowed to do?
faq.a: Yes. You allowlist tools per agent and the Gateway governs every action with budgets and a full audit trail, so an agent only does what you permit.

ctaTitle: Spend your day selling, not typing.
ctaSubtitle: Let agents handle the research and admin while you close, all wired into the stack you already use.
ctaNote: CRM connected · In your voice · Gateway-governed
